title: Data Exfiltration - DNS Tunneling Detected
description: Anomalous DNS traffic patterns detected from a research workstation (WKS-RES-042). The traffic consists of high-frequency TXT record queries to a newly registered non-standard TLD, suggesting DNS tunneling for data exfiltration. Approximately 1.8 GB of data has been transferred over the last 4 hours.

alerts.rule_name: DNS Tunneling - High Frequency TXT Queries

timeline.event: Initial DNS TXT query anomaly detected from WKS-RES-042
Threat Intel confirms domain 'research-sync-service.top' was registered <24h ago
Outbound DNS volume exceeds 1GB; alert upgraded to CRITICAL
Case opened for forensic investigation and containment
